message:
Command `# The irq BFM just defines TEST_SEQ_IRQ and includes the smoke_bfm! Same for others.
# Let's check other BFMs:
for bfm in xip_directed_bfm dma_directed_bfm pinmux_directed_bfm rand_sys_bfm contention_directed_bfm; do
  echo "=== $bfm ==="
  head -15 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_${bfm}.v | grep -E "define|include|TEST_SEQ"
done` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# The irq BFM just defines TEST_SEQ_IRQ and includes the smoke_bfm! Same for others.
# Let's check other BFMs:
for bfm in xip_directed_bfm dma_directed_bfm pinmux_directed_bfm rand_sys_bfm contention_directed_bfm; do
  echo "=== $bfm ==="
  head -15 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_${bfm}.v | grep -E "define|include|TEST_SEQ"
done"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== xip_directed_bfm ===
`define TEST_SEQ_XIP
`include "tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_smoke_bfm.v"
=== dma_directed_bfm ===
`define TEST_SEQ_DMA
`include "tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_smoke_bfm.v"
=== pinmux_directed_bfm ===
`define TEST_SEQ_PINMUX
`include "tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_smoke_bfm.v"
=== rand_sys_bfm ===
`define TEST_SEQ_RAND_SYS
`include "tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_smoke_bfm.v"
=== contention_directed_bfm ===
`define TEST_SEQ_CONTENTION
`include "tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_smoke_bfm.v"

extras.command:
# The irq BFM just defines TEST_SEQ_IRQ and includes the smoke_bfm! Same for others.
# Let's check other BFMs:
for bfm in xip_directed_bfm dma_directed_bfm pinmux_directed_bfm rand_sys_bfm contention_directed_bfm; do
  echo "=== $bfm ==="
  head -15 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/tb_mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_${bfm}.v | grep -E "define|include|TEST_SEQ"
done
